exploration_notes:
Found retry with exponential backoff implementations across all three repos:

**kubernetes/kubernetes**: The core `wait.ExponentialBackoff` function is defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/wait/backoff.go` along with `ExponentialBackoffWithContext` and `NewExponentialBackoffManager`. These are used extensively across the codebase: webhook retry logic in `apiserver/pkg/util/webhook/webhook.go`, goroutine map backoff in `pkg/util/goroutinemap/exponentialbackoff/`, volume operations
